fund_name: Quant ELSS Tax Saver Fund Direct Growth
exit_load: Exit load A fee payable to a mutual fund house for exiting a fund (fully or partially) before the completion of a specified period from the date of investment.
tax_implication: If you redeem within one year, returns are taxed at 20%. If you redeem after one year, returns exceeding Rs 1.25 lakh in a financial year are taxed at 12.5%.

Sanjeev Sharma is the Current Fund Manager of Quant ELSS Tax Saver Fund Direct Growth fund. This scheme was made available to investors on 15 Apr 1996. Sanjeev Sharma is the Current Fund Manager of Quant ELSS Tax Saver Fund Direct Growth fund. The fund currently has an Asset Under Management(AUM) of ₹87,740 Cr and the Latest NAV as of 06 Mar 2026 is ₹400.34. The Quant ELSS Tax Saver Fund Direct Growth is rated Very High risk. about_fund.investment_objective: The scheme aims to generate capital appreciation by investing predominantly in equity shares with growth potential. The secondary objective is to give dividend and other income.

faqs.question: How to Invest in Quant ELSS Tax Saver Fund Direct Growth?
faqs.answer: You can easily invest in Quant ELSS Tax Saver Fund Direct Growth in a hassle-free manner on Groww. The process is extremely simple, quick and completely paperless. Invest in a few minutes with the following steps:Log on to your Groww accountSearch for Quant ELSS Tax Saver Fund Direct Growth from the search boxIn order to invest, you will have to complete all the KYC formalities which are completely online and paperless and take a few minutes to completeOnce you are done with that, you can start investing in Quant ELSS Tax Saver Fund Direct Growth as SIP or lumpsum as per your investment objective and risk tolerance

faqs.question: What kind of returns does Quant ELSS Tax Saver Fund Direct Growth provide?
faqs.answer: The Quant ELSS Tax Saver Fund Direct Growth has been there from 07 Jan 2013 and the average annual returns provided by this fund is 12.58% since its inception.

faqs.question: How to Redeem Quant ELSS Tax Saver Fund Direct Growth?
faqs.answer: If you want to sell your Quant ELSS Tax Saver Fund Direct Growth holdings, go to your holding on the app or web and simply click on it. You will get two options - redeem & invest more; click on redeem and enter your desired amount or if you wish to redeem the entire holding amount then select the 'redeem all' checkbox.

faqs.question: What is the PE and PB ratio of Quant ELSS Tax Saver Fund Direct Growth?
faqs.answer: ThePE ratioratio of Quant ELSS Tax Saver Fund Direct Growth is determined by dividing the market price by its earnings per share and thePB ratioof the same is evaluated by dividing the stock price per share by its book value per share (BVPS).
